FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: ETL Staging Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

FOLDER.NAME: bl_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Blackline Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

SOURCE.DESCRIPTION: This flat file is used for Blackline Journal.
SOURCE.NAME: FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS_SRC

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Add Currently Processed Flat File Name Port

TARGET.DESCRIPTION: This flat file is used for Blackline Journal.
TARGET.NAME: FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS

FOLDER.NAME: bl_project
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: Blackline Project Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to archive files. Read the command documentation for more information.
TASK.NAME: cmd_archive_file

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to copy files from one location to another. After copying it will archive source files and create .list file if more than 1 file is copied. Read the command documentation for more information.
TASK.NAME: cmd_copy_file

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

MAPPING.DESCRIPTION: Check the data from JDE table and generate Blackline extract based on GLPOST column
MAPPING.NAME: m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: SQ performing join of F0011, F0911 and F0901, filtering records based on condition.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: sq_to_F0011_F0911_F0901

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F01151 table to get EAETP and EAEMAL column based on EAAN8
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_F01151

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F0092 table to get ULAN8 column based on ULUSER
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_F0092

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on staging table based on F0911_GLDCT, F0911_GLDOC, F0911_GLKCO, F0911_GLJELN, F0911_GLLT column
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: lkp_S_ZJ_JOURNALS

TABLEATTRIBUTE.NAME: Lookup condition
TABLEATTRIBUTE.VALUE: F0911_GLDCT = GLDCT AND F0911_GLDOC = GLDOC AND F0911_GLKCO = GLKCO AND F0911_GLLT = GLLT AND F0911_GLJELN = GLJELN

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Set Flag based on GLDCT, GLDOC, GLKCO, GLDGJ, GLLT, GLJELN
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Flag

TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: IIF(ISNULL(F0911_GLDCT) OR ISNULL(F0911_GLDOC) OR ISNULL(F0911_GLKCO) OR ISNULL(F0911_GLLT) OR ISNULL(F0911_GLJELN),'N','Y')
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: out_Flag

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Checking for the null values for fields and replacing double quotes and perform trim operation
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Replace_trim

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Expression for trim logic for fields.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Trim

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Generating the filename dynamically to append the timestamp with the name
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Filename

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Same Flat File used which has loaded in the another pipeline in this mapping toappend the timestamp in the file name.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: sq_FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS_SRC

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Passing the records which are having GLPOST = 'P'
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: flt_GLPOST

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Delete the records in staging table based on primary key fields
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: upd_delete

TRANSFORMATION.DESCRIPTION: Checking for the null values for fields and replacing double quotes.
TRANSFORMATION.NAME: exp_Replace

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: SQ performing join of F0011, F0911 and F0901, filtering records based on condition.
INSTANCE.NAME: sq_to_F0011_F0911_F0901

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F01151 table to get EAETP and EAEMAL column based on EAAN8
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_F01151

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on F0092 table to get ULAN8 column based on ULUSER
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_F0092

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Lookup on staging table based on F0911_GLDCT, F0911_GLDOC, F0911_GLKCO, F0911_GLJELN, F0911_GLLT column
INSTANCE.NAME: lkp_S_ZJ_JOURNALS

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Set Flag based on GLDCT, GLDOC, GLKCO, GLDGJ, GLLT, GLJELN
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Flag

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Checking for the null values for fields and replacing double quotes and perform trim operation
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Replace_trim

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Expression for trim logic for fields.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Trim

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Generating the filename dynamically to append the timestamp with the name
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Filename

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Same Flat File used which has loaded in the another pipeline in this mapping toappend the timestamp in the file name.
INSTANCE.NAME: sq_FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS_SRC

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0901

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0911

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: JDE table which loads data to Blackline flat file.
INSTANCE.NAME: F0011

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Same Flat File used which has loaded in the another pipeline in this mapping toappend the timestamp in the file name.
INSTANCE.NAME: FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS_SRC

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Passing the records which are having GLPOST = 'P'
INSTANCE.NAME: flt_GLPOST

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Delete the records in staging table based on primary key fields
INSTANCE.NAME: upd_delete

INSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Checking for the null values for fields and replacing double quotes.
INSTANCE.NAME: exp_Replace

SHORTCUT.COMMENTS: This flat file is used for Blackline Journal.
SHORTCUT.NAME: Shortcut_to_FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS_SRC

SHORTCUT.COMMENTS: This flat file is used for Blackline Journal.
SHORTCUT.NAME: Shortcut_to_FF_BL_ZJ_JOURNALS

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Maximum Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Maximum Percentage of Total Memory Allowed For Auto Memory Attributes
Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Save session log for these runs
Session Log File Max Time Period

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION FAILURE COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end_fail

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to initiate ETL load process. FOR USE AS A PRE-SESSION COMMAND.
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_start

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

TASK.DESCRIPTION: Command to end ETL load process. FOR USE AS POST-SESSION SUCCESS COMMAND
TASK.NAME: cmd_etl_end

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Fail task if any command fails

WORKFLOW.DESCRIPTION: This workflow is used to generate blackline journals report after comparing Staging table and JDE tables
WORKFLOW.NAME: wf_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS

SESSION.DESCRIPTION: This session is used to extract all records from S_ZJ_JOURNALS table based on GLPOST extract records from JDE tables and generate Blackline extract
SESSION.NAME: s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Additional Concurrent Pipelines for Lookup Cache Creation
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Fail task if any command fails
Write Backward Compatible Session Log File
Allow Pushdown for User Incompatible Connections

TASKINSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: This session is used to extract all records from S_ZJ_JOURNALS table based on GLPOST extract records from JDE tables and generate Blackline extract
TASKINSTANCE.NAME: s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS

TASKINSTANCE.DESCRIPTION: Copy command will transfer the generated file for target to outbound location when no record got picked from Source
TASKINSTANCE.NAME: cmd_copy_file_zero_record

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Start.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $s_m_BL_FF_ZJ_JOURNALS.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file_zero_record.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_copy_file_zero_record.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Assignment.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Assignment.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error message for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $Assignment.ErrorMsg

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Status of the previous task that is not disabled
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_archive_file.PrevTaskStatus

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.DESCRIPTION: Error code for this task's execution
WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_archive_file.ErrorCode

WORKFLOWVARIABLE.NAME: $cmd_archive_file.ErrorMsg

ATTRIBUTE.NAME: Write Backward Compatible Workflow Log File
Save workflow log for these runs
Allow concurrent run with unique run instance name
Allow concurrent run with same run instance name
Maximum number of concurrent runs per Hub

FOLDER.NAME: zj_shared
FOLDER.DESCRIPTION: JDE Shared Folder Primary: Vikram Chauhan Secondary: Veretta Schnackenberg
